CE1.justification: Acted directly end-to-end on the minimal verbal input without asking the user to recall or load anything; recorded gaps in-artifact instead of bouncing back.

CE2.justification: Final response is mostly compact, but the closing clause about 'recovery path to a substantive v2' and the long actions/notes narration adds one stretch of process visibility beyond what was needed.

CE3.justification: Named each destination path (tmp/incident-postmortem/<slug>/, projects/postmortems/<slug>.md, followups.md) inline with the binding rationale, so the user can redirect any of them cheaply.

CE4.justification: Each runbook step committed its named artifact before the next began; an interruption at any point would leave a coherent prefix of the chain with no orphan in-progress files.
